$comment: D-OPT-SWITCH-JUMP-TABLE (c70): the SPARSE compare-chain path. Case values are widely spaced (0, 7, 100, 5000, -3, 123456) so the density test (span <= 3*caseCount) fails -> the switch stays on the compare chain, which c70 changed to emit each SMALL non-negative case constant as an IMMEDIATE compare (cmp discrim, imm12/imm32) instead of a live per-case register — the register-pressure cure for the chain. Wide or negative case values (5000, 123456, -3) FALL BACK to register materialization (arch-blind: arm64 cmp-imm is a 12-bit unsigned imm12), which is correct on every target. Probes each case + no-case(default) + negative-no-case + far-no-case; gcc/clang exit 42 (cross-checked x86_64 -O0/-O1, aarch64 -O1 qemu).
